name: ChatPT
description: AI physiotherapist on a 3D anatomical model — click where it hurts, describe symptoms, and receive clinical assessments with personalized rehab plans
content:
# ChatPT

AI physiotherapist on a 3D anatomical model.

## What it does
ChatPT lets you click where it hurts on an interactive 3D body, describe your symptoms, and receive a clinical assessment from an AI physiotherapist agent. The agent reasons over a RAG pipeline of medical textbooks, diagnoses the affected muscles, and generates a personalized rehab/workout plan — all visualized in real time on a color-coded anatomical model.

## Features
- Interactive 3D anatomical model with 200+ individually selectable muscles
- AI physiotherapist agent with multi-step reasoning and tool calling
- RAG over clinical knowledge base with Qdrant vector search
- Targeted rehab plan generation for affected muscle groups
- Per-muscle condition tracking with severity levels and history
- Voice input via Whisper for hands-free symptom description
- Real-time state sync with Convex reactive database
